- The Last Time I Committed Suicide (1997) (Drama): Rated 3.0/5
- Grumpier Old Men (1995) (Comedy|Romance): Rated 5.0/5
- My Best Friend's Wedding (1997) (Comedy|Romance): Rated 5.0/5
- Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory (1971) (Children|Comedy|Fantasy|Musical): Rated 3.0/5
- Toy Story (1995) (Adventure|Animation|Children|Comedy|Fantasy): Rated 2.0/5

Consider these two movies they have not seen:

- Movie A: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope (1977) (Action|Adventure|Sci-Fi), average rating 4.09/5 (2635 ratings)
- Movie B: Batman & Robin (1997) (Action|Adventure|Fantasy|Thriller), average rating 2.14/5 (354 ratings)

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the two movies' average ratings differ by 1.60 to 2.00, users prefer the higher-rated movie 91% of the time.

TASK: Predict which movie Person 1 would rate higher. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (Movie A) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (Movie B).
